name: XENOTILT: HOSTILE PINBALL ACTION
short_description: LIGHTNING STRIKES AGAIN!! XENOTILT, the sequel to the cult hit, DEMON'S TILT. Get ready for another PINBALL FANTASY. XENOTILT shreds the envelope with face-melting gameplay & graphics.
detailed_description:
XENOTILT: HOSTILE PINBALL ACTION

Turbo-Charged Pinball Reloaded!!

FEATURES:

  • AN EXPANSIVE 3 STORY TABLE

  • NIGHTMARISH NEW BOSSES

  • REALTIME LIGHTS, GORGEOUS SPRITEWORK

  • 9 BALL MULTIBALL MATRIX

  • BIG NUMBERS, BULLET HELL

  • CAVERNOUSLY DEEP MECHANICS

  • A MEGA-DRIVEN SOUNDTRACK BY EC2151

Multiball unleashed!!

3 TIER PLAYFIELD
Welcome to the SAMARITAN, A derelict ship turned HOSTILE, has anyone survived?

XENOPHAGE SWARM
A vicious infestation that plagues the SAMARITAN.THE TURRET SYSTEM
BIG BULLETS chew up baddies & smash enemy volleys.

THE PERK SYSTEM
Upgrade your WEAPONS, DEFENSE & SCORING POWER with 9 UNIQUE PERKS.

THE MULTIBALL MATRIX
Holds 9 Balls, Activates Perks, Unleash MULTIBALL!!

HARDCORE MODE
ONE BALL, MAXXED FIREPOWER.

EX-MODE
EX-CLUSIVE Bonus Rooms. EX-TREME power-ups. EX-TENDED challenge!!

EX-SURVIVORS
Rescue hidden SURVIVORS. Hire them for unique BONUS SKILLS!

CRISIS MODE
CHAOTIC TIME ATTACK. Go the distance and enter SUDDEN DEATH!

STEAMDECK:

GREAT ON THE GO! Gameplay that rocks the small screen.
Great for short bursts, or that long commute!

This might hurt...

THE XENOPHAGE:

HERA the Rogue Pirate A.I.
A sentient Malware has taken over the SAMARITAN. COSMIC PIRATE QUEEN.

CHRYSALIS
A bruiser of a XENOPHAGE bug, swarm protector.

T.I.G.E.R. SUPREME
Offensive security measures for the SAMARITAN.

STAR PILOT
Addicted to LIFE SUPPORT he functions now as the UNDEAD NAVIGATOR.

MECHA-NEKO
Weaponized Blackjack Dealer. Press your luck for big points!

OLMECH
STONE GOD grafted with cybernetic enhancements.

BROOD MOTHER
HIVE MOTHER to the XENOPHAGE SWARM. Don't touch her babies!!

AUDIO / VISUAL

"Hi-Bit", massive colorful sprites inspired by the Neo-Geo, Saturn and PlayStation era. Scaling, rotation, camera zooms... No "blast processor" required! A Mega-Driven Soundtrack: An all-NEW OST true to the guttural sound of the Sega Genesis, composed by ec2151

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America
*languages with full audio support
